steps.t: Radagast can be found at the tree nursery just outside of Felegoth. Radagast the Brown has been asking after you. You should seek him out.
You should examine the plant-life near the banks of the corrupted river Rhachló in hopes of discovering what still sickens the wood.
Oroniel can be found by the northern banks of the Rhachló near Felegoth. You should present your findings to Oroniel.
A sleeping Elf lies near Oroniel. You should examine the area and find out what has happened here.
Oroniel can be found by the northern banks of the Rhachló. You should speak to Oroniel about what you have learned.
